title: Chinese state hackers target telcos with new malware toolkit
summary: A China-linked advanced persistent threat actor tracked as UAT-9244 has been targeting telecommunication service providers in South America since 2024, compromising Windows, Linux, and network-edge devices. [...]

title: Bing AI promoted fake OpenClaw GitHub repo pushing info-stealing malware
summary: Fake OpenClaw installers hosted in GitHub repositories and promoted by Microsoft Bing's AI-enhanced search feature instructed users to run commands that deployed information stealers and proxy malware. [...]

title: Wikipedia hit by self-propagating JavaScript worm that vandalized pages
summary: The Wikimedia Foundation suffered a security incident today after a self-propagating JavaScript worm began vandalizing pages and modifying user scripts across multiple wikis. [...]

title: WordPress membership plugin bug exploited to create admin accounts
summary: Hackers are exploiting a critical vulnerability in the User Registration & Membership plugin, which is installed on more than 60,000 WordPress sites. [...]

title: FBI arrests suspect linked to $46M crypto theft from US Marshals
summary: ​A U.S. government contractor's son, accused of stealing more than $46 million in cryptocurrency from the U.S. Marshals Service, was arrested Wednesday on the island of Saint Martin. [...]

title: Google says 90 zero-days were exploited in attacks last year
summary: Google Threat Intelligence Group (GTIG) tracked 90 zero-day vulnerabilities actively exploited throughout 2025, almost half of them in enterprise software and appliances. [...]

title: 2026 Browser Data Reveals Major Enterprise Security Blind Spots
summary: The browser is becoming the operating system for modern work, yet many enterprises still treat it as an extension of network or endpoint security. Keep Aware's 2026 State of Browser Security Report shows 41% of employees used AI web tools while browser-based phishing, extensions, and social engineering drive new security blind spots. [...]

title: Police dismantles online gambling ring exploiting Ukrainian women
summary: Spanish and Ukrainian law enforcement authorities dismantled a criminal ring that exploited war-displaced Ukrainian women to run an online gambling scheme that laundered nearly €4.75 million in illicit proceeds. [...]

title: Cisco flags more SD-WAN flaws as actively exploited in attacks
summary: ​Cisco has flagged two Catalyst SD-WAN Manager security flaws as actively exploited in the wild, urging administrators to upgrade vulnerable devices. [...]

title: Phobos ransomware admin pleads guilty to wire fraud conspiracy
summary: A Russian national pleaded guilty to a wire fraud conspiracy charge related to his role in administering the Phobos ransomware operation, which breached hundreds of victims worldwide. [...]
